text:
The Albino Ponytail Cat (ポニーテールキャットのアルビノ, Ponītēru Kyatto no Arubino) is a feline species mentioned by a curator of the Southernpiece Auction House. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 187 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

A curator of the Southernpiece Auction House says to Kite, Gon, Killua, and the Amateur Hunters to inform him if they ever happen to find an Albino Ponytail Cat. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

The Albino Ponytail Cat is not mentioned in the 2011 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 77 (2011)
